reference_postmortem: At T+00:01, checkout-frontend began returning 502 errors when calling downstream services. Investigation revealed DNS resolution failures — services could not resolve each other's hostnames via CoreDNS. Logs showed NXDOMAIN and lookup timeout errors across multiple services. The root cause was a Chaos Mesh DNS fault injection causing intermittent resolution delays. The 'connection refused' errors on health checks were a secondary effect. Mitigation: remove DNS chaos experiment. Follow-up: add DNS resolution monitoring, implement service mesh sidecar for resilient service discovery, add retry with exponential backoff on DNS failures.
